description: Draws an elliptical annotation defined by four anchor points. Creates an ellipse fitting through four specified points with optional styling.
utility: Highlight or annotate elliptical regions in diagrams with four-point anchors

arguments.name: point1
arguments.description: First anchor point, specified as at(row, col)

arguments.name: point2
arguments.description: Second anchor point, specified as at(row, col)

arguments.name: point3
arguments.description: Third anchor point, specified as at(row, col)

arguments.name: point4
arguments.description: Fourth anchor point, specified as at(row, col)

arguments.name: style
arguments.description: Optional styling modifiers (c for color, s() for style, dash, fadeout, etc.)

alternates.syntax: annotationellipse(at(r1, c1), at(r2, c2), at(r3, c3), at(r4, c4), c(purple))
